raw_consumer_statement: Im a XXXX XXXX XXXX man on XX/XX/year> I was scammed and fraudulent charges were issued to my credit card. I contacted the company on the same day XX/XX/XXXX. Told him I was scammed had fraudulent charges and I did not want them to go through. Citibank told me to wait until the charges appear and then file a dispute. I filed a dispute they said it was gift card charge, and the dispute should never have been filed to begin with. They checked into it and told me I was responsible for the charges the same scammer Got me on another bank XXXX XXXX  when I contacted XXXXXXXX XXXX they canceled my card put a hold on it and I did not get charged any of the chargers that were on the XXXX XXXX card because they stopped it immediately. Why didnt Citibank do the same thing when I told them they were fraudulent
